message:
feat(fp-frame,fp-index): add DataFrame.astype, astype_safe, rolling_with_center, Index.names/to_flat_index

- DataFrame.astype(dtype) for all-columns cast
- DataFrame.astype_safe/astype_columns_safe with errors='coerce'|'ignore'|'raise'
- Refactor coerce_scalar into shared helper, simplify Series.astype_safe
- Series.rolling_with_center(window, min_periods, center) consolidated API
- Index.names() property, set_names_list(), to_flat_index()
- 12 new tests, all 1514 workspace tests passing, clippy clean

Closes: bd-2rxg, bd-1bpt, bd-2ogn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
